analysis.summary: Identified 5 action item(s), 3 decision(s), and 2 risk(s) from the meeting notes.
decisions: Use the existing Jira project for workflow follow-up instead of creating a separate tracker.
Keep the first release focused on annotation upload, review assignment, and uncertainty escalation.
Pilot with 20 retrospective ultrasound studies before expanding to live cases.
risks: If reviewer assignment is unclear, pilot feedback may be noisy.
If the clinician guide is late, onboarding will slip.
